synopsis: Complaint of the 'Determined Minority' of New Life Presbyterian Church, Charlotte, NC against the Judicial Commission of Central Carolina Presbytery regarding improper dismissal of church members. The General Assembly sustained one item (Item #2: commission exceeded BCO 57-5 membership requirements), sustained in part one item (Item #5), and did not sustain the remaining items (Items #1, #3, #4, #6, #7).
